name: MLTPCONTROL
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[MLTPCONTROL] ON [dbo].[STOKHAREKETLERI]
AFTER INSERT,UPDATE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
DECLARE @BIRIM_REF		INT
DECLARE @ANABIRIM_REF	INT
DECLARE @CARPAN1		FLOAT
DECLARE @CARPAN2		FLOAT

SELECT 
@CARPAN1          	= R.CARPAN1 ,
@CARPAN2          	= R.CARPAN2 ,
@ANABIRIM_REF      	= R.ANABIRIM_REF ,
@BIRIM_REF			= R.BIRIM_REF
FROM INSERTED R
 
IF (@ANABIRIM_REF = @BIRIM_REF) AND (@CARPAN1<>@CARPAN2)
BEGIN 
rollback transaction RAISERROR ('Ana birim carpanları hatalı.' , 16, 1)
END
